member.name: M:PublicKeyECDSA.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.param: the byte array representing the key

member.name: M:PublicKeyECDSA.FromBytesInternal(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a key from a byte array representation.
member.param: the byte array representing the key

member.name: M:PublicKeyECDSA.FromSubjectKeyInfoInternal(SubjectPublicKeyInfo)
member.summary: Create a key from a subject public key info object.
member.param: the subject public key info object
